metadata.name: AEGIS data ETL
metadata.description: A Flex Template that ingests AEGIS genomics data from ENA/BioSamples and updates Elasticsearch indices

parameters.name: input_path
parameters.label: Input path
parameters.helpText: The path and filename prefix for input files. Example: gs://prj-ext-prod-biodiv-data-in-aegis/*.jsonl

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.label: Output destination
parameters.helpText: The path and filename prefix for writing the output. Example: gs://prj-ext-prod-biodiv-data-in-aegis/output

parameters.name: project_name
parameters.label: Project name
parameters.helpText: Project name for AEGIS pipeline (should be 'aegis')
